snippet: Pytho sculpted a statue of «Illyrio Mopatis» when Illyrio was sixteen years old. The statue is magnificently carved and ...
...years old. The statue is magnificently carved and still graces the court in «Illyrio's manse» .(wiki:Pytho_Malanon.cite_ref-Radwd5.7B.7B.7B3.7D.7D.7D.7B.7B.7B4.7D.7D.7D_...
